papers.title_en: Enhanced Lymphoma Subtype Classification and Prognosis Using Machine Learning with 18F-FDG PET/CT Radiomics: Beyond SUVmax
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发一种基于18F-FDG PET/CT影像组学的机器学习模型，作为淋巴瘤活检的非侵入性替代方案。通过引入肿瘤与肝脏比值（TLR）等放射组学特征，研究不仅实现了更精准的淋巴瘤亚型分类，还显著提升了生存预后分析的效能。该方法超越了传统的SUVmax指标，为淋巴瘤的临床诊断和个性化治疗提供了强有力的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background This study explored a machine learning approach using 18F-FDGPET/CT as a non-invasive alternative to biopsy, incorporating tumor-to-liver ratio(TLR) PET radiomics, and performed survival analysis to improve lymphoma …

papers.title_en: Radiogenomic Approach Combining CT-based Radiomics and Liquid Biopsy Improves Prognostic Stratification in Patients with Advanced NSCLC
papers.tldr: 本研究针对晚期非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC），提出了一种结合CT影像组学与循环肿瘤DNA（ctDNA）液体活检的放射基因组学方法。通过整合宏观影像特征与微观基因组数据，研究旨在提升患者的预后分层精度。结果表明，这种多模态整合方案在预测患者生存预后方面优于单一评估手段，为临床制定个体化治疗方案提供了更可靠的无创评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: Background Radiomics and liquid biopsy represent minimally invasive approachesto assess disease characteristics in solid tumors. We integrated computedtomography (CT) radiomics and circulating tumor DNA (ctDNA) analysis to enhance …

papers.title_en: Cluster habitat-based diffusion MRI radiomics for differentiation of glioblastoma from solitary brain metastasis
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在鉴别胶质母细胞瘤（GB）与单发脑转移瘤（SBM）。针对两者显著的肿瘤内异质性，研究提出了一种基于神经突取向分散与密度成像（NODDI）的聚类生境影像组学方法。通过分析肿瘤内部不同微环境的放射组学特征，该方法能够捕捉更细微的病理差异，为临床提供了一种高精度的无创鉴别诊断手段，显著提升了诊断效能。
papers.abstract_en: Objective Given the distinct intratumoral heterogeneity of glioblastoma (GB) andsolitary brain metastasis (SBM), habitat-based radiomics derived from neuriteorientation dispersion and density imaging (NODDI) may offer enhanced diagnostic …

papers.title_en: Integrating Orthogonal Supervision for Sparse Semi-Supervised 3D Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对3D医疗影像全标注成本高昂的问题，本文提出了一种集成正交监督的稀疏半监督学习框架。该方法通过在稀疏标注的数据上引入正交监督机制，有效利用了未标注切片的信息，从而在降低标注工作量的同时，显著提升了分割模型的性能和鲁棒性，为高效医疗影像分析提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Recent advances in semi-supervised learning (SSL) have significantly improved 3Dmedical image segmentation. However, fully annotating volumetric data slice by sliceremains costly and time-consuming. To address this, sparsely annotated SSL has …

papers.title_en: Structured prompt-guided knowledge injection for medical image segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对医学图像分割中解剖变异大和标注受限的挑战，本文提出了结构化提示引导的知识注入网络（SPKI-Net）。该框架通过引入结构化提示来引导外部知识注入，旨在增强模型对复杂解剖结构的理解能力。SPKI-Net 有效利用了先验知识来弥补标注数据的不足，在多个医学影像分割任务中表现出色，为提高分割精度和鲁棒性提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate medical image segmentation remains a longstanding challenge due toanatomical variability and limited annotations. In this paper, we propose StructuredPrompt-guided Knowledge Injection Network (SPKI-Net), a novel framework that …

papers.title_en: Medical Multimodal Large Language Models: A Survey
papers.tldr: In recent years, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have gradually givenrise to medical multimodal large language models (Medical MLLMs) through theintegration of multimodal data such as clinical reports, medical images, physiological …。
papers.abstract_en: In recent years, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have gradually givenrise to medical multimodal large language models (Medical MLLMs) through theintegration of multimodal data such as clinical reports, medical images, physiological …

papers.title_en: PeFoMed: Parameter efficient fine-tuning of multimodal large language models for medical CXR
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗胸部X光（CXR）影像分析，提出了PeFoMed框架，旨在通过参数高效微调（PEFT）技术提升多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在医学领域的应用效果。该方法在保持模型性能的同时显著降低了计算资源需求，为医疗影像的自动化诊断和报告生成提供了高效且精准的解决方案，有效推动了多模态大模型在临床实践中的落地。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) represent an evolutionary expansion inthe capabilities of traditional large language models, enabling them to tacklechallenges that surpass the scope of purely text-based applications. Recent works …

papers.title_en: Evaluating Clinically Significant Prostate Cancer with Pathology-Registered Radiomics: A Multi-Reader Assessment Using Lesion Diameter-based Simplified …
papers.tldr: 本研究开发了一种基于病理配准的影像组学特征，旨在提高临床显著性前列腺癌（csPCa）的检测精度。通过引入基于病灶直径的简化分割方法，研究在多读者评估中验证了该特征的诊断效能。该方法不仅简化了影像处理流程，还为前列腺癌的精准诊断提供了可靠的定量支持，具有较高的临床应用潜力。
papers.abstract_en: Rationale and Objectives To develop a pathology-derived radiomics signature fordetecting clinically significant prostate cancer (csPCa) and to evaluate itsperformance using lesion diameter-based simplified segmentations. Materials and …

papers.title_en: Combined radiomics, PI-RADS, and clinical model improve significant prostate cancer prediction and guide biopsy decision
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发并验证一种基于MRI影像组学的预测模型，用于识别显著性前列腺癌（sPCa）。通过整合影像组学特征、PI-RADS评分及临床指标，研究构建了一个综合预测模型。结果表明，该模型在预测sPCa方面优于单一的PI-RADS评分，能更有效地辅助临床活检决策，减少不必要的穿刺，具有重要的临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Objectives The aim of this study was to develop and validate an MRI radiomics-based predictive model to discriminate significant prostate cancer (sPCa), compare itwith PI-RADS, and determine whether incorporating PI-RADS and other clinical …

papers.title_en: Preoperative Prediction of TACE Refractoriness in Hepatocellular Carcinoma Using CT-Based Radiomics Model
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发一种结合影像组学和临床风险因素的综合预测模型，用于术前预测肝细胞癌（HCC）患者对经导管动脉化疗栓塞术（TACE）的早期耐药性。通过分析CT影像特征，该模型能够有效识别高风险患者，为临床制定个性化治疗方案提供依据，从而优化肝癌患者的预后管理并提升治疗效果。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose To develop an integrated predictive model that combines radiomics, andclinical risk factors to predict early refractoriness to transarterial chemoembolization(TACE) in patients with hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). Methods The study cohort …

papers.title_en: Evaluating the Utility and Limitations of Machine Learning Tumor Segmentation for Automated Longitudinal RANO Treatment Response Classification
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估机器学习肿瘤分割技术在自动化纵向RANO治疗反应分类中的实用性与局限性。虽然机器学习在脑肿瘤体积评估方面表现出色，但将其转化为端到端临床工具以准确评估治疗反应仍存在不确定性。研究通过对比分析，探讨了该技术在临床工作流中的实际应用潜力，为未来自动化肿瘤评估工具的开发提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: PURPOSE: Machine learning segmentation has emerged in tumor assessment withhigh performance in volumetric evaluation of brain tumors. It is unclear, however, ifsuch methods can be translated into full end-to-end clinical tools for assessing …

papers.title_en: Joint training to improve report generation capability from longitudinal CT volumes with a vision‑language model
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了不同训练策略对视觉语言模型（VLM）从纵向CT影像生成日语放射科报告性能的影响。研究重点在于如何通过联合训练优化模型对多时相医学影像的理解与文本输出。结果表明，特定的联合训练策略能显著提升报告生成的准确性，为自动化放射科临床工作流提供了有效的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: This study is to investigate how different training strategies affect the performance ofa VLM for the task of automatic Japanese radiology report generation fromComputed Tomography (CT) volumes. Automatically generating radiology reports …

papers.title_en: See Fair, Speak Truth: Equitable Attention Improves Grounding and Reduces Hallucination in Vision-Language Alignment
papers.tldr: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that areabsent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding isdisproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We …。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that areabsent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding isdisproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We …

papers.title_en: Bringing Value Models Back: Generative Critics for Value Modeling in LLM Reinforcement Learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型（LLM）强化学习中的信用分配难题，重新引入了经典的价值模型。作者提出了“生成式评论家”（Generative Critics）方法，通过改进价值建模来优化优势估计。该方法克服了传统价值函数在处理复杂文本生成任务时的局限性，显著提升了LLM在强化学习训练中的效率和性能，为LLM的对齐和微调提供了更精细的反馈机制。
papers.abstract_en: Credit assignment is a central challenge in reinforcement learning (RL). Classicalactor-critic methods address this challenge through fine-grained advantageestimation based on a learned value function. However, learned value models are …

papers.title_en: Eliciting Medical Reasoning with Knowledge-enhanced Data Synthesis: A Semi-Supervised Reinforcement Learning Approach
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗大模型开发中高质量推理数据匮乏的挑战，提出了一种基于知识增强数据合成与半监督强化学习的新框架。该方法通过整合外部医学知识库来引导高质量推理链的生成，并利用半监督强化学习算法对模型进行持续优化。实验证明，该方法能显著提升模型在复杂医疗场景下的逻辑推理能力，为构建专业医疗AI提供了高效的数据增强与训练方案。
papers.abstract_en: While large language models hold promise for complex medical applications, theirdevelopment is hindered by the scarcity of high-quality reasoning data. To addressthis issue, existing approaches typically distill chain-of-thought reasoning traces from …

papers.title_en: A Mechanistic Analysis of Looped Reasoning Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对通过在潜空间循环层结构来提升大语言模型推理能力的新兴技术，进行了深入的机械论分析。文章探讨了循环推理模型在处理复杂逻辑任务时的内部工作机制，揭示了层循环如何通过迭代优化表征来增强模型的逻辑推演能力。该研究为理解循环架构在推理任务中的优势提供了理论基础，并为未来设计更高效的推理模型提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Reasoning has become a central capability in large language models. Recentresearch has shown that reasoning performance can be improved by looping anLLM's layers in the latent dimension, resulting in looped reasoning language models …

papers.title_en: WebCompass: Towards Multimodal Web Coding Evaluation for Code Language Models
papers.tldr: 随着大语言模型向端到端交互式Web编程智能体演进，现有基准测试多局限于文本生成和静态指标，难以全面评估其真实开发能力。本文推出WebCompass，这是一个针对代码语言模型的多模态Web编程评估基准，通过引入多模态输入和动态交互环境，为衡量模型在复杂Web开发任务中的表现提供了更全面的评估框架。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models are rapidly evolving into interactive coding agents capableof end-to-end web coding, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only narrow slices ofthis capability, typically text-conditioned generation with static-correctness metrics …

papers.title_en: Pause or Fabricate? Training Language Models for Grounded Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在输入信息不完整时容易产生“幻觉”并编造虚假结论的问题，提出了面向落地推理（Grounded Reasoning）的训练方法。通过引导模型在信息缺失时选择“暂停”而非盲目推断，有效提升了模型在复杂推理任务中的可靠性。该方法不仅减少了不可靠信息的生成，还增强了模型对输入完整性的感知能力，为构建更诚实、可信的AI系统提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models have achieved remarkable progress on complex reasoningtasks. However, they often implicitly fabricate information when inputs areincomplete, producing confident but unreliable conclusions--a failure mode we term …

papers.title_en: VLA Foundry: A Unified Framework for Training Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.tldr: VLA Foundry 是一个开源框架，旨在统一大语言模型（LLM）、视觉语言模型（VLM）和视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）的训练流程。针对目前 VLA 研究中预训练与动作训练阶段不兼容的问题，该框架提供了一套完整的端到端流水线，简化了从基础模型到机器人动作控制模型的开发过程，为开源社区提供了标准化的研究工具。
papers.abstract_en: We present VLA Foundry, an open-source framework that unifies LLM, VLM, andVLA training in a single codebase. Most open-source VLA efforts specialize on theaction training stage, often stitching together incompatible pretraining pipelines. VLA …

papers.title_en: Clinically-Informed Modeling for Pediatric Brain Tumor Classification from Whole-Slide Histopathology Images
papers.tldr: 本研究针对儿科脑肿瘤病理诊断中存在的数据稀缺、类别不平衡及形态学重叠等挑战，提出了一种结合临床信息的全切片图像（WSI）深度学习建模方法。通过整合临床先验知识，该模型能够更准确地识别细微的形态差异，有效提升了儿科脑肿瘤的自动分类性能，为临床辅助诊断提供了可靠的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate diagnosis of pediatric brain tumors, starting with histopathology, presentsunique challenges for deep learning, including severe data scarcity, classimbalance, and fine-grained morphologic overlap across diagnostically distinct …

papers.title_en: Fine-Grained Analysis of Shared Syntactic Mechanisms in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究深入探讨了语言模型在处理复杂语法时，其内部机制是否遵循语言学中的跨结构原则。通过对模型内部表示和计算过程进行细粒度分析，研究者考察了不同语法结构之间是否存在共享的神经机制。该研究揭示了模型在处理多样化句法任务时的内在一致性，为理解大模型的语言习得与可解释性提供了重要的理论依据和实证支持。
papers.abstract_en: While language models demonstrate sophisticated syntactic capabilities, the extentto which their internal mechanisms align with cross-constructional principles studiedin linguistics remains poorly understood. This study investigates whether models …
